prose: Fukui reactivity indices for benzaldehyde computed via DFT using B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF backend) in the gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Mulliken partial charges were calculated for the neutral, N+1 cation (doublet), and N−1 anion (doublet) states. Fukui indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰) and dual descriptor (Δf = f⁺ − f⁻) were derived from the charge differences. Most electrophilic site: atom 3 (benzene C ortho to CHO), f⁺ = 0.399; most nucleophilic site: atom 1 (carbonyl O), f⁻ = 0.238. All SCF calculations converged; charge conservation checks (Σf⁺ = 1.0000, Σf⁻ = 1.0000) passed, confirming integrity.
